results.Label: capacity planning, level-1, add
results.LLM code:
def process_graph(graph_data):    
    graph_copy = copy.deepcopy(graph_data)    
    new_node_id = 'new_EK_PACKET_SWITCH_26'    
    graph_copy.add_node(new_node_id, name=new_node_id, type=['EK_PACKET_SWITCH'])    
    graph_copy.add_edge('ju1.a3.m3', new_node_id, type=['RK_CONTAINS'])    
    graph_json = nx.readwrite.json_graph.node_link_data(graph_copy)    
    return_object = {        
        'type': 'graph',        
        'data': graph_json,        
        'updated_graph': graph_json    
    }    
    return return_object

def process_graph(graph_data):
    graph_copy = graph_data.copy()
    graph_copy.add_node('new_EK_PORT_9', name='new_EK_PORT_9', type=['EK_PORT'], physical_capacity_bps=1000)
    graph_copy.add_edge('ju1.a1.m4.s2c6', 'new_EK_PORT_9', type=['RK_CONTAINS'])
    graph_json = nx.readwrite.json_graph.node_link_data(graph_copy)
    return_object = {
        'type': 'graph',
        'data': graph_json,
        'updated_graph': graph_json
    }
    return return_object
